global_design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Blend military/tactical UI elements with modern SaaS data density.
Emotion First: The UI must convey an atmosphere of high-alert, command-center precision.
Contrast & Hierarchy: Use 1px sharp strokes and intense vibrant accents (Red/Blue/Green) against deep obsidian space to direct attention to threats.
Density: Utilize the 'Control Room' grid. Every pixel matters. High data density using monospaced fonts for technical data.

rules: Never use pure black #000000. Anchor on #0A0A0A (Deep Obsidian).
Ensure text contrast ratios meet 4.5:1 against surfaces.
Use explicit hover states: hover:bg-[#1C1C1E] hover:text-white.
Status colors must be highly saturated to pop against the dark theme.
Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk for headings.
All IP addresses, MAC addresses, port numbers, and timestamps MUST use the mono_data font.
Overlines and labels must be uppercase with wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).

grid_system.mode: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID

surfaces.styling: Flat backgrounds (bg-[#121212]), max rounded-lg (8px radius) or sharp corners, 1px solid borders (border-white/10).
surfaces.shadows: Replace soft drop shadows with 1px solid strokes or subtle inner glows. No soft neumorphic shadows.

layout_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, but lean into density. p-4 to p-6 for widget internals, p-6 to p-8 for main layout containers. Always include padding inside bordered containers to avoid text collision.

buttons.primary: bg-[#007AFF] text-white font-bold hover:bg-[#0056B3] transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-2
buttons.danger: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white font-bold hover:bg-[#CC2F26] transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-2
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-2

components.cards_widgets: border border-white/10 bg-[#121212] rounded-lg overflow-hidden flex flex-col h-full
components.tables: Dense layout. Header rows bordered bottom (border-white/10). Row hover states (hover:bg-white/5). Use Shadcn Table but customize padding to py-2 px-3 for high density.
components.badges: Sharp corners or rounded-sm. High contrast. Danger: bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 border border-red-500/50. Safe: bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 border border-green-500/50.
components.inputs: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/20 text-white focus:border-[#007AFF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#007AFF] rounded-md px-3 py-2

motion_interactions.hover: Translate-y-[-1px] or border color intensify. Always explicitly declare text colors on hover.
motion_interactions.radar_scan: Use framer-motion to create a sweeping gradient line or pulsing rings for the active scanning state.
motion_interactions.list_entrance: Staggered fade-in and slide-up for devices as they are 'discovered' in the network.
motion_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Animations must be purposeful, not distracting.

icons_assets.rules: Use duotone or regular weights. Keep icon sizes consistent (16px for inline, 20px-24px for actions, 32px+ for metrics).

images.description: Minimalist glowing radar illustration for zero-state or active scanning modal.
Dark server rack background to be used with a heavy opacity overlay (bg-black/80) on the login/landing screen.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

setup: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: 'Chivo', 'IBM Plex Sans', 'JetBrains Mono'. Update tailwind.config.js to include these font families.
Install dependencies: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion recharts clsx tailwind-merge`.
Initialize Shadcn components: table, badge, card, progress, dialog, sheet, button, input.
implementation: Structure the app as a Dashboard: Sidebar Navigation + Top Header (Network Interface Selector) + Main Content Area.
Main Dashboard View: Include a 'Start Scan' hero action, surrounded by summary metrics (Devices Found, High Risk, Suspicious Ports).
Network Discovery Table: List devices with IP, MAC, Vendor, Open Ports, Risk Score, and Status. Make rows clickable to open a Device Details side sheet.

Camera Detection Logic (Mocked): When 'Start Scan' is clicked, mock a scanning process over 5 seconds. Gradually populate the table with devices. Specifically mock some devices with RTSP Port 554 and Web Ports 80/8080 to trigger the 'Spy Camera' flag.
Risk Score System: Display the 0-100 score visually using a colored Progress bar or circular chart.
Device Details Panel: Display full port analysis and vulnerability flags in a high-density, terminal-like layout.
restrictions: Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for the header over scrolling content.
Do NOT use Shadcn Card heavily if a flat, border-only grid layout achieves a better 'Control Room' feel.
Always mock the scanning data dynamically so the UI can be tested and demonstrated.
